summary: Frontend-only testing of public /pricing and /demo pages for customer acquisition funnel. All tests passed - 100% success rate.
passed_tests: /pricing: Page loads correctly with data-testid='pricing-page'
/pricing: Hero title 'Acenteniz için doğru planı seçin' displays correctly
/pricing: Primary CTA '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene' present and routes to /signup?plan=trial&selectedPlan=pro
/pricing: Secondary CTA 'Demo sayfasını gör' routes to /demo
/pricing: All 3 plan cards visible (Starter, Pro, Enterprise)
/pricing: Starter plan shows ₺990/ay
/pricing: Pro plan shows ₺2.490/ay with 'Önerilen' badge
/pricing: Enterprise plan shows ₺6.990/ay
/pricing: Each plan has 4 feature bullets
/pricing: Social proof block displays 'Turizm acenteleri Syroce ile operasyon süreçlerini %40 daha hızlı yönetiyor.'
/pricing: All plan CTAs route to /signup with correct selectedPlan param
/demo: Page loads correctly with data-testid='demo-page'
/demo: Hero title 'Acentelerde Excel dönemi bitiyor' displays correctly
/demo: Subtitle 'Syroce ile rezervasyon, müşteri ve operasyon süreçlerini tek panelden yönetin. 14 gün ücretsiz deneyin.' present
/demo: Primary CTA 'Demo Hesap Oluştur' routes to /signup?plan=trial
/demo: Secondary CTA 'Fiyatları Gör' routes to /pricing
/demo: Problem section visible with 3 cards (Excel ile rezervasyon takibi, WhatsApp üzerinden müşteri yönetimi, Dağınık operasyon süreçleri)
/demo: Solution section title 'Syroce ile tüm operasyon tek panelde' present
/demo: Solution section has 4 cards (Rezervasyon yönetimi, Müşteri yönetimi, Tur ve otel takibi, Raporlama)
/demo: Final CTA section '14 Gün Ücretsiz Dene' with working buttons
Navigation: /pricing → /demo via secondary CTA works
Navigation: /demo → /pricing via secondary CTA works
Navigation: /pricing → /signup via primary CTA works
Navigation: /demo → /signup via primary CTA works
Navigation: Plan CTA buttons route to /signup with correct selectedPlan query param
critical_code_review_comments: Both pages have excellent data-testid coverage for all interactive elements
Code is clean with well-structured React components
Static fallback plans provide good UX when API fails
All required Turkish copy matches specification exactly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public /pricing and /demo pages fully implemented and working. All copy matches Turkish requirements. CTA buttons route correctly to /signup with appropriate query params. Both pages are responsive for desktop view.

features_validated: Hero sections with correct titles and subtitles
Primary and secondary CTA buttons with correct routing
Plan cards with pricing (Starter ₺990, Pro ₺2.490, Enterprise ₺6.990)
